Am 13.09.2012 20:41, schrieb Bryan Drewery:
> Hi,
> 
> This should have been fixed by ports/170771 already.
> 
> I just tried building textproc/iksemel in poudriere and it worked
> correctly.
> 
> Can you please make sure your ports tree is up to date? Also run 
> 'poudriere ports -u' to update the poudriere ports tree.
> 

sorry, I overlooked that. After updating the ports tree, I'm able to
build textproc/iksemel with poudriere flawlessly. Thanks.

- --
